name: ootbijmqwt
game: Ocarina of Time but it's just Master Quest Water Temple

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

**Items:** ensure all logically relevant items can be acquired.

options.name: start_mode
options.description:
Determines how, if at all, you can reach sphere 1 locations.
iron_boots starts you with Iron Boots and, if fewer_tunic_requirements is off, Zora Tunic.
guard_house starts you in the Market Guard House with 7 pots to open. If warp_songs is off, you can return
to the Guard House by exiting the Water Temple into the Gold Skulltula House, then exiting it.
burger_king starts you with nothing. No sphere 1 for you. We'll break all the rules. I won't tell if you won't.
If every player in the multiworld has burger_king selected, one player may be changed to guard_house.

options.name: shuffle_warp_songs
options.description:
Shuffle warp songs into the item pool, which will take you to various locations for some additional location
checks. If this is on, you will need a warp song to access the Skulltula House. If it's off, you can access it
by exiting the Water Temple.

options.name: boss
options.description: Select which boss you will fight at the end of the dungeon.

options.name: boss_key_location
options.description:
Where your Boss Key (Water Temple) may be found. Note that if you do not place it at a Skulltula reward location,
your game may end up being over with very quickly. If a Skulltula reward location is chosen, rewards beyond the one
chosen will be guaranteed to contain filler items.

options.name: tokens_in_pool
options.description: Number of Gold Skulltula Tokens in the item pool. A minimum may be enforced by your boss key location setting.

options.name: local_tokens
options.description:
This will place Gold Skulltula Tokens into local_items, so you don't have to do it manually by typing out the
whole name of the item into local_items, because you have more important things to do with your time.

options.name: enable_scarecrow
options.description: Enable the Scarecrow to be spawned by using your Ocarina.

options.name: max_health
options.description: What maximum hearts will be obtainable.

options.name: logic_fewer_tunic_requirements
options.description:
Enable the "Fewer Tunic Requirements" trick to logic, which may require you to do any and all of Water Temple
except below the central pillar without Zora Tunic.

options.name: logic_water_mq_central_pillar
options.display_name: Logic: Water Temple MQ Central Pillar with Fire Arrows
options.description:
Enable the "Water Temple MQ Central Pillar with Fire Arrows" trick to logic, which may require you to light the
torches in the Central Pillar with Fire Arrows.

options.name: logic_water_mq_locked_gs
options.display_name: Logic: Water Temple MQ North Basement GS without Small Key
options.description:
Enable the "Water Temple MQ North Basement GS Without Small Key" trick to logic, which may require hookshotting an
invisible hookshot target to get over the gate to the basement GS, skipping the locked door.

options.name: logic_lab_diving
options.display_name: Logic: Lake Hylia Lab Dive without Gold Scale
options.description:
Enable the "Lake Hylia Lab Dive without Gold Scale" trick to logic, which may require removing the Iron Boots in
the midst of hookshotting the crate, to trick the scientist into thinking you're a great swimmer.
Only relevant if shuffle_warp_songs is on.

options.name: logic_water_dragon_jump_dive
options.display_name: Logic: Water Temple Dragon Statue Jump Dive
options.description:
Enable the "Water Temple Dragon Statue Jump Dive" trick into logic, which may require you to reach the submerged
tunnel in the dragon statue room without Scales or Iron Boots using momentum from your fall from above.

options.name: logic_water_north_basement_ledge_jump
options.display_name: Logic: Water Temple North Basement Ledge with Precise Jump
options.description:
Enable the "Water Temple North Basement Ledge with Precise Jump" trick to logic, which may require a precise jump
in the northern basement to reach the ledge without hover boots or scarecrow.

options.name: logic_dc_hammer_floor
options.display_name: Logic: Dodongo's Cavern Smash the Boss Lobby Floor
options.description:
Enable the "Dodongo's Cavern Smash the Boss Lobby Floor" trick to logic. The bombable floor before King Dodongo
can be destroyed with Hammer if hit in the very center.

options.name: logic_lens_bongo
options.display_name: Logic: Shadow Temple Bongo Bongo without Lens of Truth
options.description: Enable the "Shadow Temple Bongo Bongo without Lens of Truth" trick to logic.

options.name: plando_connections
options.description:
Generic connections plando. Format is:
- entrance: "Entrance Name"
  exit: "Exit Name"
  direction: "Direction"
  percentage: 100
Direction must be one of 'entrance', 'exit', or 'both', and defaults to 'both' if omitted.
Percentage is an integer from 1 to 100, and defaults to 100 when omitted.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: fast_chests
options.description: All chest animations are fast. If disabled, major items have a slow animation.

options.name: correct_chest_appearances
options.description:
Changes chest textures and/or sizes to match their contents.
Off: All chests have their vanilla size/appearance.
Textures: Chest textures reflect their contents.
Both: Like Textures, but progression items and boss keys get big chests, and other items get small chests.
Classic: Old behavior of CSMC; textures distinguish keys from non-keys, and size distinguishes importance.

options.name: minor_items_as_major_chest
options.description: Hylian Shield, Deku Shield, and Bombchus appear in big/gold chests.

options.name: correct_potcrate_appearances
options.description:
Changes the appearance of pots, crates, and beehives that contain items.
Off: Vanilla appearance for all containers.
Textures (Content): Unchecked pots and crates have a texture reflecting their contents. Unchecked beehives with progression items will wiggle.
Textures (Unchecked): Unchecked pots and crates are golden. Unchecked beehives will wiggle.

options.name: text_shuffle
options.description:
Randomizes text in the game for comedic effect.
Except Hints: does not randomize important text such as hints, small/boss key information, and item prices.
Complete: randomizes every textbox, including the useful ones.

options.name: damage_multiplier
options.description: Controls the amount of damage Link takes.

options.name: deadly_bonks
options.description:
Bonking on a wall or object will hurt Link. "Normal" is a half heart of damage.
If Start Mode is set to "Iron Boots" and Deadly Bonks is set to "ohko", you will also start with Nayru's Love and
a Magic Meter.

options.name: no_collectible_hearts
options.description: Hearts will not drop from enemies or objects.

options.name: start_with_consumables
options.description: Start the game with full Deku Nuts.

options.name: ice_trap_appearance
options.description: Changes the appearance of traps, including other games' traps, as freestanding items.

options.name: default_targeting
options.description: Default targeting option.

options.name: display_dpad
options.description: Show dpad icon on HUD for quick actions (ocarina, hover boots, iron boots, mask).

options.name: dpad_dungeon_menu
options.description: Show separated menus on the pause screen for dungeon keys, rewards, and Vanilla/MQ info.

options.name: correct_model_colors
options.description: Makes in-game models match their HUD element colors.

options.name: background_music
options.description: Randomize or disable background music.

options.name: fanfares
options.description: Randomize or disable item fanfares.

options.name: ocarina_fanfares
options.description: Enable ocarina songs as fanfares. These are longer than usual fanfares. Does nothing without fanfares randomized.
